items.title: Residential & Real Estate Construction
items.description: We deliver high-quality residential construction projects across Lahore and Pakistan, from single-family homes to large housing schemes. Our team manages every stage from design to handover.

items.title: Commercial Construction
items.description: From plazas and offices to shopping malls, Real Enterprises has the expertise to deliver large-scale commercial projects on time and within budget.

items.title: Interior Design
items.description: Our interior design team creates functional and beautiful spaces for residential and commercial clients. We handle everything from concept to final installation.

items.title: Grey Structure Contracting
items.description: We provide expert grey structure services including foundation, columns, beams, brickwork, and roof. Solid structural work is the foundation of every great build.

items.title: Turnkey Construction Solutions
items.description: Our turnkey service covers the complete construction journey — design, permits, build, and finishing — delivered as a single seamless package.
